Market dashboard | research console

Stocks command center.

A premium dashboard shell for tracking watchlists, market structure, sector momentum, and research notes. Built as a static GitHub Pages website with optional live widgets loaded in the browser.

Educational UI only. This page is not financial advice and does not guarantee real-time data accuracy.

Research rule

Track price, but decide on process.

Use this page as a decision journal: thesis, risk, entry logic, invalidation point, and review cadence.

ThesisRiskLevelsReview

Live widget

Optional market chart embed.

Research notes

Make the dashboard useful, not noisy.

1. Define the thesis

Why does this stock deserve attention? Growth, margin expansion, sector trend, valuation reset, or technical setup?

2. Mark invalidation

Every watchlist item should have a reason to remove it. This keeps the dashboard clean.

3. Review cadence

Separate daily price movement from weekly thesis review so volatility does not become the strategy.
